popularStory.headline: Guillaume Ier de Genève (1132-1195)
popularStory.description:
Guillaume Ier de Genève, né vers 1132 et décédé le 25 juillet 1195, est comte de GenèveNote 1 de 1178 à 1195, à la suite de son père Amédée Ier.

Origine

Guillaume est le fils du comte Amédée Ier de …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Geneve I於1130年出生在瑞士吉艾福e-布格利斯時，他的父親Amédée de Genève I30歲，母親Matilda de Cuiseaux20歲。他於大約1158年與Agnes de Savoie在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1195年7月25日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Geneve I于1130年出生在瑞士吉艾福e-布格利斯时，他的父亲Amédée de Genève I30岁，母亲Matilda de Cuiseaux20岁。他于大约1158年与Agnes de Savoie在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1195年7月25日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geneve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1 Altered spelling of northern French Denef(v)e, a habitational name, with the preposition de, for someone from places called Neffe in the Belgian provinces of Namur and Luxembourg.
2 Dutch (de Neve): kinship name from Middle Dutch neve ‘grandson’, ‘(male) cousin’, ‘nephew’ + the definite article de.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Geneve I was born in 1130, in Chêne-Bougeries, Geneva, Switzerland, his father, Amédée de Genève I, was 30 and his mother, Matilda de Cuiseaux, was 20. He married Agnes de Savoie about 1158, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 25 July 1195, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Geneva, Geneva, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Geneve I est né en 1130, à Chêne-Bougeries, Genève, Suisse, son père, Amédée de Genève I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Cuiseaux, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Savoie environ 1158, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1195, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Genève, Genève, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Geneve I 1130 in Chêne-Bougeries, Genf, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amédée de Genève I 30 und seine Mutter Matilda de Cuiseaux 20. Er hat um 1158 in Frankreich Agnes de Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 25. Juli 1195 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Genf, Genf, Schweiz begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Geneve I è nato il nel 1130 nel Chêne-Bougeries, Ginevra, Svizzera, il suo padre, Amédée de Genève I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Cuiseaux, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Savoie circa 1158, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 25 luglio 1195, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Ginevra, Ginevra, Svizzera.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Geneve Iが1130年にスイスジェンeブチeネ-ボウジャーイスで生まれた時，父Amédée de Genève Iは30歳，母Matilda de Cuiseauxは20歳であった。約1158年にフランスでAgnes de Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1195年7月25日に故郷で65歳で死去し，スイスジェンeブジェンeブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Geneve I(이)가 1130년 스위스 e브 che니-보우그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amédée de Genève I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Cuiseaux(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1158년 프랑스에서 Agnes de Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1195년 7월 25일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스위스 e브 e브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Geneve I nasceu em 1130, em Chêne-Bougeries, Genève, Suiça, seu pai, Amédée de Genève I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Cuiseaux, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Savoie aproximadamente 1158, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1195, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Genève, Genève, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Geneve I родился в 1130 г. в местности чeне-боугириесь, дженeв, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Amédée de Genève I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Cuiseaux, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Savoie около 1158 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 25 июля 1195 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности дженeв, дженeв, Швейцария.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Geneve I nació en 1130, en Chêne-Bougeries, Genève, Suiza, su papá, Amédée de Genève I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Matilda de Cuiseaux, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes de Savoie aproximadamente 1158, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 25 de julio de 1195, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Genève, Genève, Suiza.
